title: New "Brain Cleaning" Technique Improves Memory in Aging Mice

title: What to know about measles breakthrough cases and why vaccination is still important
summary: As measles spreads across the U.S., a few fully vaccinated people have contracted rare breakthrough cases. Here's what to know and why vaccination is still important.

title: Nitisinone: A Game-Changer in Malaria Control and Mosquito Eradication?
summary: A new drug called nitisinone, which makes human blood poisonous to mosquitoes, could be a vital new tool to fight malaria. The drug kills mosquitoes but is not toxic to humans.

title: Bird flu found for second time in seals at north Norfolk colony
summary: Bird flu has been detected in 15 dead seals at Blakeney Point for the second time this year.

title: I'm 44 and will never have children with my partner: Mother's Day brings a range of emotions - here's what nobody tells you about child-free life
summary: Erica Crompton, 44, who lives in Staffordshire with her partner Paul and their cats has listed the ways being child-free has changed her life, after making a crucial decision about the future.
